preamble: The diphthongization of a nasalized front vowel [ẽ] to [ei] (or [ẽĩ]) is a characteristic development in the history of the Portuguese language.

examples.note: Historical development from Latin 'venit' to Portuguese 'vem', where the nasalized vowel develops an off-glide.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
